records.title: IEC 60076-24:2020 Power Transformers -- Part 24: Specification of Voltage Regulating Distribution Transformers (VRDT)
records.authors_or_org: International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC)
records.claim_supported: IEC 60076-24:2020 (VRDT) is a confirmed, currently active publication (Edition 1.0, 9 July 2020) in the IEC 60076 international power-transformer standard family, covering distribution transformers 25kVA-3150kVA up to 36kV HV / 1.1kV LV with automatic voltage-regulation components. The IEC 60076 series is the standard family against which SST prototypes are informally compared in the literature; a specific dedicated SST test standard within IEC 60076 was NOT independently confirmed this session -- that narrower compliance-gap claim is inference from secondary literature, not independently verified.
records.notes: IEC is Geneva-based; standard applies globally including US/EU/Asia markets. TU Eindhoven study (found via search, not separately logged) documents the SST/IEC 60076-3 compliance gap referenced in claim_supported. | CORRECTION: scout's title ('Gas-filled fluid power transformers') did NOT match the actual publication at this URL/publication number. The original claim about an SST/IEC-60076-3 compliance gap (attributed to an uncited 'TU Eindhoven study') is NOT independently verified and is flagged as unconfirmed inference. Kept accepted as a genuine, live, T1 standards-body primary record, but claim narrowed to what was actually confirmed.

records.title: Double-Side Cooled SiC MOSFET Power Modules With Sintered-Silver Interposers for a 100-kW/L Traction Inverter
records.authors_or_org: Chao Ding, Shengchang Lu, Zichen Zhang, Kun Zhang, Tam Nguyen, Khai D. T. Ngo, Rolando Burgos, Guo-Quan Lu (Center for Power Electronics Systems, Virginia Tech)
records.claim_supported: Crossref record re-fetched and confirmed this session (journal-article, IEEE Trans. Power Electronics, vol. 38, no. 8, pp. 9685-9694, Aug 2023, matching title/venue/year): double-side-cooled SiC MOSFET power module with sintered-silver interposers reduces power-loop parasitic inductance by ~23% and increases power-handling capability by ~44% vs. a prior double-side-cooled design, targeting a 100 kW/L EV traction inverter.

Downgraded: tier T1->T2, source_type buyer_procurement->trade_press, demand_evidence_type buyer_tender->none.
